home.faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
_comment_home_faq: 6 SEO-optimized FAQs for the home page — covers: free, privacy/no upload, no account, available tools, file size limit, mobile support

home.faq.items.q: Are all the tools on UploadLess free to use?
home.faq.items.a: Yes, every tool on UploadLess is completely free with no hidden fees, no subscriptions, and no limits. You can compress videos, compress PDFs, and convert video formats as many times as you like at no cost.

home.faq.items.q: Do my files get uploaded to a server?
home.faq.items.a: No. All processing happens directly in your browser using WebAssembly technology. Your files never leave your device and are never sent to any server, so your data stays completely private.

home.faq.items.q: Do I need to create an account to use these tools?
home.faq.items.a: No account or sign-up is required. Just open the tool you need and start immediately — no registration, no email, no password.

home.faq.items.q: What tools are available on UploadLess?
home.faq.items.a: UploadLess currently offers a free online video compressor, a PDF compressor, and a video converter supporting formats like MP4, WebM, MOV, MKV, and MP3. More tools are being added regularly.

home.faq.items.q: Is there a file size limit?
home.faq.items.a: There is no hard server-side limit since all processing happens in your browser. In practice, most tools handle files up to 500 MB. Performance depends on your device's memory and processing power.

home.faq.items.q: Can I use UploadLess on my phone or tablet?
home.faq.items.a: Yes! UploadLess is fully responsive and works on smartphones, tablets, and desktop computers. No app installation is needed — just open the site in your mobile browser and use any tool.

compress_video.faq.items.q: How can I compress a video online?
compress_video.faq.items.a: Add your video file, keep Auto optimize turned on, and click Compress. UploadLess will automatically reduce the video file size in your browser without uploading it to a server.
Yes. UploadLess is a free online video compressor. You can compress video files directly in your browser without creating an account.

compress_video.faq.items.q: Is my video uploaded to a server?
compress_video.faq.items.a: No. Video compression runs locally in your browser using WebAssembly technology. Your video file stays on your device and is never uploaded to our server.

UploadLess supports most video formats that can be processed in your browser, including MP4, MOV, AVI, MKV, WebM, M4V, 3GP, FLV, and more. The compressed output is saved as MP4 for better compatibility across devices and platforms.
Auto optimize is the default compression mode. It automatically chooses balanced video compression settings to reduce file size while keeping the video quality suitable for everyday use.

compress_video.faq.items.q: Can I choose a target video file size?
compress_video.faq.items.a: Yes. Turn off Auto optimize to use Target file size mode. You can enter a custom size or use quick tags for platforms like Discord, LINE, Gmail, WhatsApp, and Slack.

compress_video.faq.items.q: Will compressing a video reduce its quality?
compress_video.faq.items.a: Usually, yes, but the goal is to make the video file smaller while keeping it watchable. Auto optimize is designed to balance file size and quality for most videos.

compress_video.faq.items.q: Why should I use a browser-based video compressor?
compress_video.faq.items.a: A browser-based video compressor is faster and more private for everyday files because the video does not need to be uploaded first. It is useful when you want to reduce video file size for email, chat apps, or sharing online.

pdf_compressor.how_to_use.steps: Select a PDF file from your device or drag and drop it into the upload area.

pdf_compressor.faq.title: PDF Compressor FAQ

pdf_compressor.faq.items.q: Is my PDF uploaded to a server?
pdf_compressor.faq.items.a: No. PDF compression runs locally in your browser using Ghostscript powered by WebAssembly. Your PDF file never leaves your device.

pdf_compressor.faq.items.q: What is the maximum PDF file size?
pdf_compressor.faq.items.a: You can compress PDF files up to 100 MB. Very large or image-heavy PDFs may take longer depending on your device and browser.
Yes. UploadLess lets you compress PDF files online for free with no sign-up, no watermark, and no installation required.

pdf_compressor.faq.items.q: How do I reduce PDF file size online?
pdf_compressor.faq.items.a: Select or drag and drop your PDF, choose a quality preset, then click Compress. The tool will reduce the PDF file size in your browser and let you download the smaller file.

pdf_compressor.faq.items.q: Which quality preset should I choose?
pdf_compressor.faq.items.a: Balanced (Ebook) is the default and works best for most PDFs. Choose Maximum (Screen) when you want stronger compression and a smaller file size.

pdf_compressor.faq.items.q: Can I compress a PDF without losing quality?
pdf_compressor.faq.items.a: PDF compression usually reduces file size by optimizing images and document data, so some visual quality may change. For the best balance, use the Balanced (Ebook) preset.

pdf_compressor.faq.items.q: Can I compress a PDF for email?
pdf_compressor.faq.items.a: Yes. This tool can make PDF files smaller for email attachments, form uploads, and sharing. The final size depends on the original PDF content and the quality preset you choose.

pdf_compressor.faq.items.q: Can I compress a password-protected PDF?
pdf_compressor.faq.items.a: Yes, if you know the password. Enter the PDF password before compression so the file can be unlocked and processed locally in your browser.

pdf_compressor.faq.items.q: Does this PDF compressor work on Mac, Windows, iPhone, and Android?
pdf_compressor.faq.items.a: Yes. UploadLess works in modern browsers on Mac, Windows, iPhone, Android, and other devices. No app installation is required.

pdf_compressor.faq.items.q: Can I compress multiple PDF files at once?
pdf_compressor.faq.items.a: Currently, this tool compresses one PDF at a time to keep the workflow simple, private, and stable in your browser.

video_converter.faq.items.q: What is an online video converter?
video_converter.faq.items.a: An online video converter lets you change a video file from one format to another, such as MP4, WebM, MOV, MKV, or AVI. With UploadLess, the conversion runs directly in your browser, so you do not need to install software.

video_converter.faq.items.q: Is this video converter free to use?
video_converter.faq.items.a: Yes. UploadLess is a free online video converter you can use without creating an account. You can upload a video, choose an output format, convert it, and download the converted file from your browser.

video_converter.faq.items.q: Are my video files uploaded to a server?
video_converter.faq.items.a: No. Video conversion is processed locally on your device using browser-based technology such as WebAssembly. Your files are not uploaded to our servers, which helps keep your videos private.

video_converter.faq.items.q: What video formats can I convert?
video_converter.faq.items.a: You can convert most common video file formats, including MP4, MOV, MKV, WebM, AVI, and more. You can also choose audio formats like MP3 when you want to extract sound from a video.

video_converter.faq.items.q: Can I convert a video to MP3 audio?
video_converter.faq.items.a: Yes. Select MP3 as the target format to extract the audio track from your video. This is useful when you want to turn a video file into an audio file for listening or sharing.

video_converter.faq.items.q: Will the converted video have a watermark?
video_converter.faq.items.a: No. UploadLess converts your video without adding a watermark. Your downloaded file is the converted version of your original video, without branding placed on top of it.

video_converter.faq.items.q: Can I convert HD or 4K videos?
video_converter.faq.items.a: Yes, you can convert HD and 4K videos if your device and browser have enough processing power. Because conversion runs locally, larger or higher-resolution videos may take longer to process.

video_converter.faq.items.q: Why should I use a browser-based video converter?
video_converter.faq.items.a: A browser-based video converter is convenient because it works without installing apps, and it is more private because the conversion can happen on your own device. It is a fast way to convert video files online while keeping control of your files.

mov_to_mp4.faq.title: MOV to MP4 FAQ

mov_to_mp4.faq.items.q: How do I convert MOV to MP4 online?
mov_to_mp4.faq.items.a: Upload your MOV file, click Convert, and download the MP4 file when it is ready. UploadLess converts MOV to MP4 directly in your browser, so you do not need to install any software.

mov_to_mp4.faq.items.q: Is this MOV to MP4 converter free?
mov_to_mp4.faq.items.a: Yes. You can use this MOV to MP4 converter online for free without creating an account. Just add your MOV video, convert it, and save the MP4 file to your device.

mov_to_mp4.faq.items.q: Are my MOV files uploaded to a server?
mov_to_mp4.faq.items.a: No. The MOV to MP4 conversion runs locally on your device in the browser. Your video files are not uploaded to our servers, which helps keep your files private.

mov_to_mp4.faq.items.q: Can I convert iPhone MOV videos to MP4?
mov_to_mp4.faq.items.a: Yes. MOV files recorded on iPhone, iPad, cameras, or QuickTime can be converted to MP4. This makes the video easier to play, upload, edit, and share on more devices and platforms.

mov_to_mp4.faq.items.q: Will converting MOV to MP4 reduce video quality?
mov_to_mp4.faq.items.a: Converting a MOV file to MP4 may slightly change the video quality depending on the original file and conversion settings. UploadLess is designed to keep the output clear while creating a widely compatible MP4 file.

mov_to_mp4.faq.items.q: Why should I convert MOV files to MP4?
mov_to_mp4.faq.items.a: MP4 is one of the most widely supported video formats. Converting MOV to MP4 can make your video easier to open on Windows, Android, browsers, social media platforms, and video editing apps.

mov_to_mp4.faq.items.q: Can I convert large MOV files?
mov_to_mp4.faq.items.a: Yes, you can convert large MOV files if your browser and device have enough memory and processing power. Because the conversion runs locally, larger videos may take more time to convert.

mov_to_mp4.faq.items.q: Will the converted MP4 file have a watermark?
mov_to_mp4.faq.items.a: No. UploadLess converts MOV videos to MP4 without adding a watermark. The downloaded MP4 file will not include UploadLess branding on your video.
